instructions.text: Create a CSS file and register it in the `customCss` array in `astro.config.mjs`
original_snippets: NEVER override Starlight styles without the `customCss` array

instructions.text: Override `--sl-*` CSS custom properties on `:root` to change colors and typography globally
Use `:root[data-theme='dark']` and `:root[data-theme='light']` selectors for light/dark variants
NEVER use `.dark` class selectors — Starlight uses `data-theme='dark'` attribute, not a class
Install `@astrojs/starlight-tailwind` when using Tailwind with Starlight
original_snippets: NEVER add raw Tailwind imports without the compatibility layer

instructions.text: Import `@astrojs/starlight-tailwind` before Tailwind's own CSS — layer order is critical
Map Tailwind color tokens to Starlight via `--color-accent-*` and `--color-gray-*` in `@theme`
NEVER mix `--sl-*` CSS variables with Tailwind `@theme` overrides for the same property
Always include `font-display: swap` in custom `@font-face` rules to prevent FOIT
Use Fontsource for zero-config font loading: install package and add weight files to `customCss`
Use the Starlight color theme editor to generate accent/gray palettes without manual color math
Any CSS added without an `@layer` block is unlayered and automatically takes precedence over Starlight
